content.en:
"Allah, shouldn't this matter be considered?"

The Bronze Luo Divine Lord tried to persuade.

He didn't want to see such a scene, and he didn't want Tiange to be defeated and withdraw from the stage of Tianlan Giant City.

After all, Tiange has withdrawn from Tianlan Giant City, and it can go to other places, and it will still rise, but it will delay some years.

As a member of the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce, the Bronze Luo God Lord hopes to pull Ye Tian and Tiange to the side of the Tianlan Giant City Power Association, and if Ye Tian becomes the supreme of the Terran in the future, they will also be able to have a little more say in the Terran, which is also the result that the master of the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce wants.

Another point is that the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce has a good relationship with the Tianlan City Lord, and it is precisely with the support of the Tianlan City Lord that it can grow into the second largest force in the Tianlan Giant City.

And the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce also knew about Ye Tian's situation from the Tianlan City Lord, so he befriended Ye Tian like this.

Although the other forces knew that Ye Tian was very powerful, and he was the most powerful highness of the human race in the past, they only regarded Ye Tian as an ordinary supreme-level highness, thinking that Ye Tian was expected to become a supreme in the future, but that was also the future, and it was a long time later.

It is impossible for a genius to have the hope of becoming the supreme, they will admit it, and the battle of the Terran forces does not need to look at the strength, just look at the talent, what are the major forces of the Terran fighting for!

Some people will please the genius in advance, and some people will not.

And the Ten Lights Sword Sect will not please Ye Tian, nor do they like to see the rise of the Heavenly Pavilion, once the Heavenly Pavilion rises, the interests of the Ten Lights Sword Sect in the Tianlan Giant City will inevitably be reduced in the future.

Unlike other forces, other forces have basically stagnated and developed, and a little more resources and less resources have little impact.

And the Ten Lights Sword Sect is developing very rapidly, otherwise it would not have moved its headquarters away.

Now, one branch of the Ten Lights Sword Sect in Tianlan Giant City is enough to rank among the top few in Tianlan Giant City, and if you talk about the strength of the entire Ten Lights Sword Sect, it is definitely comparable to the City Lord's Mansion of Tianlan Giant City.

Now, the entire Ten Light Sword Sect is considered to be a superior level among the dominant-level forces, and there are several masters, and it is not that there is no hope of advancing to the supreme-level forces in the future.

Therefore, the Ten Lights Sword Sect is now doing its best to cultivate a supreme, and although there is little hope, they are still working hard.

In addition, the cultivation of other disciples is also working hard, so the consumption of resources of the Ten Lights Sword Sect is an astronomical amount, and Tianlan Giant City is an important resource point of the Ten Lights Sword Sect, as long as it tries its best to suppress the new forces, it can obtain enough resources.

Tiange wanted to enter the Tianlan Giant City Power Association, and the Ten Light Sword Sect was naturally against it, and he was not afraid of offending Ye Tian at all.

"Tongluo Divine Lord, there is no need to persuade me anymore, I have a sense of proportion!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Seeing this, the Divine Lord of Tongluo waved his hand, sighed, and stopped persuading.

The Gao River Chamber of Commerce is only a member of the Power Society, and it can't reach the level of deciding the entire Power Council with one word, so it can't stop the Heavenly Pavilion from challenging the Ten Light Sword Sect!

"Hey, if the Heavenly Pavilion is defeated, you will never be able to enter the Tianlan Giant City Power Association, and the president will definitely blame me for not doing things well!"

The Bronze Luo Divine Lord was secretly quite helpless.

......

Soon, the major forces gave way to an area, allowing the Heavenly Pavilion and the Ten Light Sword Sect to challenge each other.

Baili Sword Master said: "According to the rules of the challenge, the two forces need to send a great god-level, galaxy-level and galaxy-level to fight, each battle is worth one point, and the most important thing is the battle between the leaders of the two sides, a total of six points, and a tie will score three points each." According to the total score to determine the winner or loser, Allah of Ten Thousand Laws You can go and call a great god level of your Heavenly Pavilion to come over, as for the Star River level, I am afraid that only Ten Thousand Laws Allah you personally go up, after all, your Heavenly Pavilion only has this Star River level!"

Baili Sword's words were full of provocation, which made Ye Yu on the side very annoyed.

"Brother, let me go up to the galaxy level, I will destroy the prestige of the Ten Light Sword Sect!"

Ye Yu hurriedly said.

"No, galaxy level, let your sister-in-law fight, your strength is not as good as your sister-in-law. Besides, Tiange also needs to show its strength to be enough to deter the enemy, and your strength is not enough to deter the enemy!" Ye Tiandao.

"Okay!"

Ye Yu nodded.

In terms of strength, she is indeed inferior to Xiao Yue, after all, she has always been inferior to Xiao Yue, and Xiao Yue often receives Ye Tian's benefits, and her strength improvement is far from being comparable to her.

Of course, she would not be jealous of her sister-in-law, because Ye Tian also gave her a lot of benefits and opportunities.

In terms of combat talent and potential, she is really inferior to Xiao Yue.

"But brother, in the Great God Level, we don't seem to have that kind of person in Tiange who is too powerful!" Ye Yu frowned.

She knew very well that it was not impossible for an old dominant-level force like the Ten Light Sword Sect to cultivate a Son of the Universe, and perhaps there would be a Great God-level powerhouse at the level of the Son of the Universe in this generation.

Of course, it is unlikely to be the kind of Son of the Universe comparable to the Heaven Rank of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, but even the most ordinary Son of the Universe is not comparable to the Great God level of the Heavenly Pavilion.

"It doesn't matter, it's okay to lose the competition at this level of the great god level, the real decision is in the battle between the leaders of the two sides, the great god level, galaxy level, and galaxy level just show the strength of the disciples of the two sides. In addition, the Ten Light Sword Sect of Tianlan Giant City is only a branch, and it is unlikely that there will be a great god who is too powerful, as long as the great god level of the Heavenly Pavilion does not lose too badly!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay, I'll call Feng Zhi over, her talent is very good, her combat power ranks first among the Heavenly Pavilion Great God Level, and she was also the top Nine-Star Tianjiao at the beginning, and she is only one step away from the Son of the Universe!" Ye Yu said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

It didn't take long for Feng Zhi from the Heavenly Pavilion to come over, and a great god-level from the Ten Light Sword Sect also came over.

"Not a child of the universe!"

Ye Tian saw through the details of the Great God level of the Ten Light Sword Sect at a glance, but in terms of breath, the Great God level of the Ten Light Sword Sect was much more powerful than Feng Zhi.

This is not to say that the Great God level of the Ten Light Sword Sect has great potential and better talent, it can only be said that the other party has a long cultivation period and has accumulated deeper, while Feng Zhi's accumulation is not enough.

Sure enough.

Feng Zhi fought with the Great God level of the Ten Light Sword Sect, fought dozens of moves, and was defeated by the other party.

"Pavilion Master, Deputy Pavilion Master, Feng Zhi has disgraced Tiange!"

The injured Feng Zhi said ashamedly.

"You are very good, it's just that the cultivation years are a little shorter, and you will definitely be able to surpass the other party in the future!" Ye Tian encouraged.

"Thank you Pavilion Master for comforting, Feng Zhi will continue to work hard!"

Feng Zhi said with a resolute face.

The other side.

A star river level of the Ten Light Sword Sect and the Hundred Miles Sword Lord said: "Lord Hundred Miles, the foundation of the Heavenly Pavilion is too weak, and it is impossible to send a powerful god and galaxy level, although the Ten Thousand Laws Allah of the Heavenly Pavilion is very against the sky, at the level of the Star River level, our Ten Light Sword Sect cannot find a galaxy level that is more powerful than Ten Thousand Laws Allah, but the galaxy level is enough to crush the other party." I don't know which galaxy-level to send to the field, what are the arrangements for Lord Baili?"

"Let the first sword of the branch strike! It's best to defeat the galaxy level of the Heavenly Pavilion in an instant with overwhelming strength. Heavenly Pavilion's galaxy-level cultivation years are not very long, this should be a very easy task, right?"

"Lord Baili, if the first sword strikes, it must be very easy, the first sword has reached the level of more than half a step of the son of the universe, if it is not a little worse luck, it can definitely be promoted to the son of the universe!"

The galaxy said.

Rumble!!!!

The first sword of the Ten Light Sword Sect came and appeared in the makeshift ring, while Xiao Yue was sent out on the side of the Heavenly Pavilion.

The major forces all knew Xiao Yue's origin, and when they saw Xiao Yue appear, they were all shocked.

"The wife of Allah of Ten Thousand Laws actually appeared, isn't Allah of Ten Thousand Laws worried about accidents? Hahaha, Allah of Ten Thousand Laws is a gifted in time and space, if he really wants to make a move, he will definitely have time to rescue. "

"Hahaha, that's right!"

"Not sure which side will win?"

"Don't you still need to think about it, it must be the Ten Light Sword Sect, the one who appeared is the first sword of the Ten Light Sword Sect Branch, the Cold Light Sword Monarch, and it is enough to rank in the top three at the galaxy level in the headquarters of the Ten Light Sword Sect. "

The people present talked a lot, and no one was optimistic about Xiao Yue.

And Ye Tian always smiled, not worried about his wife at all, only he really knew Xiao Yue's current combat power.

The Cold Light Sword Monarch is definitely not Xiao Yue's opponent!
